stem: Each side of equilateral triangle P is multiplied by a scale factor of r to create equilateral triangle Q. The length of each side of triangle Q is greater than the length of each side of triangle P. Which of the following could be the value of r?
rationale:
Choice D is correct. For triangle Q's sides to be longer than P's, the scale factor r must be greater than 1. The value 18/17 is greater than 1.

Choice A would shrink to length 0. Choice B would keep lengths the same. Choice C is less than 1, so it would shrink the triangle.
